        <!DOCTYPE html>
        <html>
        <head>
        <meta charset="utf-8">
        <style type="text/css">
        #T_abc_ td {
          color: red;
        }
        </style>
        </head>
        <body>
        <table id="T_abc_">
          <thead>
            <tr>
              <th class="blank level0" >&nbsp;</th>
              <th class="col_heading level0 col0" >A</th>
            </tr>
          </thead>
          <tbody>
            <tr>
              <th id="T_abc_level0_row0" class="row_heading level0 row0" >a</th>
              <td id="T_abc_row0_col0" class="data row0 col0" >2.610000</td>
            </tr>
